recommendations.title: A Walk on the Moon
recommendations.overview: The world of a young housewife is turned upside down when she has an affair with a free-spirited blouse salesman.

recommendations.title: The Last Kiss
recommendations.overview: Michael has a great job, has his 4 best friends, and is in love with a beautiful girl at 30. He loves Jenna but his life seems predictable until someone else enters his life. It seems that everybody's having relationship problems.

recommendations.title: Sons of the Desert
recommendations.overview: Ollie and Stan deceive their wives into thinking they are taking a medically necessary cruise when they are really going to a lodge convention.

recommendations.title: Conviction

recommendations.title: A Goofy Movie

recommendations.title: Rushmore

recommendations.title: Collateral
recommendations.overview: Cab driver Max picks up a man who offers him $600 to drive him around. But the promise of easy money sours when Max realizes his fare is an assassin.

recommendations.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2

recommendations.title: Broken Flowers
recommendations.overview: Introverted Don Johnston receives an anonymous letter from an ex-lover informing him that he has a son who may be looking for him. A freelance sleuth neighbor motivates Don to embark on a cross-country search for his past flames seeking answers.
